analogies: "So, we're able to split up all the system prompts and make each agent's job very specific and increase the quality of their outputs. It also gives us the flexibility to have different chat models for different agents."
frameworks: "So, if the user wants something to do with email, I'm not going to worry about which tools. I'm just going to send it to the email agent and the email agent will figure it all out because as you can see here, every single agent has its own brain."
